description: Glassmorphism design tokens — frosted glass cards over vibrant aurora gradient backgrounds. Includes classic glassmorphism + Apple Liquid Glass + Microsoft Acrylic variants.

variants.classic: frosted blur + translucent fill + thin light border
variants.liquid-glass: Apple iOS 26 — dynamic refraction, specular highlights
variants.acrylic: Microsoft Fluent — more opaque, in-app or host backdrop

base.comment: dark navy — glass is invisible on flat white

background.ironRule: NEVER put glass on flat white/cream — the blur effect is invisible there

saturate.comment: boosts colors through the frost — separates premium from washed-out

borderRadius.comment: sharp corners feel wrong on glass — it's a soft material

headline.comment: never black/900 weight — too heavy for glass

label.comment: NO ALL CAPS — too aggressive for glass's soft mood

shadow.comment: soft and diffuse — never hard offset (that's brutalism)

accessibility.warning: Most accessibility-risky popular style. Text contrast often fails WCAG 4.5:1 over blurred backgrounds.
mitigations: increase fill opacity to 0.18-0.35 if contrast fails
add dark overlay behind text only
test on the actual background image, not the designer's gradient

forbidden: glass on flat white/cream background (no blur visible)
fully opaque card (then it's just a regular card)
